Clarity.justification: The generated diagram is not visually represented; instead, it shows a text-based PlantUML script with a syntax error. This makes it difficult for both technical and non-technical stakeholders to understand. There are no visual symbols, icons, or layout to interpret.

Completeness.justification: The generated diagram lacks the visual elements present in the ground truth, such as the layered structure and labeled components. It only contains textual descriptions and relationships without any graphical representation.

Consistency.justification: The generated diagram is not consistent with the ground truth as it is a text-based script rather than a visual diagram. There is no structural or semantic alignment due to the absence of a graphical layout.
